title: DragoonPack
description: A official mod pack for wyvernsmp, now for the public! It includes Dragons! Technology! Food! And so much more!
body:
Hey! Welcome to this mod pack this pack is for the WyvernSMP but it is for all and should work on any world! This pack allows you to go outside of the normal Minecraft
limits while this mod pack doesn't have a real set theme it tends to stick more medieval with some exceptions like create and such but with 100+ mods there is no way to count the hours and possibilities you can do with this mod pack! From dragons to machines to farming to monsters, you won't get bored along with semi-frequent updates it's always fresh!
Features!
- Create along with add-ons for it
- Ice and Fire 
- Biomes o' plenty with terralith
- Farmers Delight
- Yungs structures 
- Voicechar
- and so much more 100+ mods 
Quark
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
